title: 有馬記念の後に・本当の祭り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black dashes through the Arima Kinen. A
post-race concert stirs fans into a greater frenzy,
setting the perfect mood for a festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond
renew their promise, this time to run together in
next year's Arima Kinen.
